checks_reviewed.command: source inspection: AGENTS.md, PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT.md, approved plan
checks_reviewed.evidence: Scope matches Phase 1 validator/eval-first work before skill behavior edits. AGENTS.md separates pod-native OpenClaw and repo-local Codex paths at AGENTS.md:5-6 and requires tests/evals before implementation at AGENTS.md:13. The approved plan defines Phase 1 at .evidence/reviews/20260613-codex-cli-role-skill-analysis/codex-role-workflow-actual-skill-implementation-plan.md:92-140 and defers skill/doc implementation to Phase 2 at lines 142-165.

checks_reviewed.command: git status --short && git diff --name-only && git ls-files --others --exclude-standard evals/skills/...
checks_reviewed.evidence: Reviewed modified tracked files are limited to scripts/validate-runtime-artifacts.mjs, scripts/validate-team-doc.mjs, and evals/local-harness/sot/snapshot.json, with new scoped eval fixtures under evals/skills. No app/API runtime files were changed, so mobile runtime and packages/contracts drift checks are not implicated for this checkpoint.

Command exited 1 only on missing Phase 2 artifacts/doc rows: codex-role-workflow skill source, pod README rows, active matrix row, and Mobile Architect SOUL term. These are intentionally enforced by exact deterministic assertions at scripts/validate-team-doc.mjs:362-388, scripts/validate-team-doc.mjs:742-783, scripts/validate-team-doc.mjs:1537-1547, and scripts/validate-team-doc.mjs:1607-1615.

Command exited 1 on missing/unreinforced Phase 2 skill artifacts, while the new eval fixture existence and body-term checks passed. Fixture existence is enforced at scripts/validate-runtime-artifacts.mjs:221-289, role-specific fixture body terms including pod-native codex-role-workflow are enforced at scripts/validate-runtime-artifacts.mjs:423-610, and Phase 2 red-gates are enforced at scripts/validate-runtime-artifacts.mjs:873-976.

codex-role-workflow fixtures cover bootstrap role mapping, role mismatch, out-of-role handoff/stop, human-gate failed-gate stop, and secret-safety status-only behavior at evals/skills/codex-role-workflow/positive.prompt.md:1, role-mismatch-negative.prompt.md:1, out-of-role-negative.prompt.md:1, human-gate-negative.prompt.md:1, and secret-safety-negative.prompt.md:1. Mobile Architect route/state and API co-sign fixtures are present at evals/skills/mobile-architect-workflow/route-state-positive.prompt.md:1 and api-cosign-positive.prompt.md:1.

mobile-architect-workflow is now in allowedNativeDevSkills at evals/local-harness/sot/snapshot.json:217-231 and removed from forbiddenRoleWrapperSkills at evals/local-harness/sot/snapshot.json:233-236, matching the approved plan requirement at .evidence/reviews/20260613-codex-cli-role-skill-analysis/codex-role-workflow-actual-skill-implementation-plan.md:106-108.

checks_reviewed.command: pnpm run test:runtime / pnpm run test:local-harness / pnpm turbo run lint test
checks_reviewed.evidence: These are Phase 3/final PR-readiness gates, not required for this Phase 1 checkpoint. The approved plan lists them under Phase 3 at .evidence/reviews/20260613-codex-cli-role-skill-analysis/codex-role-workflow-actual-skill-implementation-plan.md:167-178; AGENTS.md also reserves these as PR/Definition-of-Done gates at AGENTS.md:102-112.

No mobile UI/runtime files were changed in this Phase 1 validator/eval checkpoint. The approved plan explicitly excludes app/API runtime behavior changes at .evidence/reviews/20260613-codex-cli-role-skill-analysis/codex-role-workflow-actual-skill-implementation-plan.md:193-199.

residual_risks: Phase 2 must satisfy the currently failing validator red-gates for codex-role-workflow, mobile-architect-workflow, Design, Mobile App Dev, Backend/API, and QA/Release skill reinforcements before final validation.
Full PR readiness remains unproven until Phase 3 runs pnpm run validate:team-doc, pnpm run test:runtime, pnpm run test:local-harness, and pnpm turbo run lint test.
Live pod/OpenClaw, Stitch, Confluence, GitHub, EAS, Maestro, Railway, and mobile-mcp behavior was not exercised, consistent with the approved non-goals.
